description.en: The internal name of the campaign.
The UUID of the email list to send this campaign to.
The subject line of the campaign email.
Override the sender email address.
The HTML content of the campaign email.
Schedule the campaign to be sent at this datetime (ISO 8601 format).

description.en: The name of the email list.
The default sender email address.
The default sender name.
The default reply-to email address.
Whether new subscribers must confirm their subscription (double opt-in).

description.en: Create a new subscriber segment for an email list based on positive and negative tag filters.
description.de: Ein neues Abonnentensegment für eine E-Mail-Liste basierend auf positiven und negativen Tag-Filtern erstellen.

description.en: The UUID of the email list.
The name of the segment.
JSON array of tag names subscribers must have, e.g. ["premium"].
JSON array of tag names subscribers must NOT have, e.g. ["unsubscribed"].
If true, subscriber must have ALL positive tags. If false, any positive tag matches.
Create a subscriber import from a CSV string. The import starts in draft status — call start-subscriber-import to begin processing.
description.de: Einen Abonnenten-Import aus einem CSV-String erstellen. Der Import startet im Entwurfsstatus — starte den Import mit start-subscriber-import.

description.en: Manage email lists, campaigns, subscribers, and transactional emails with Mailcoach's powerful REST API. Automate your email marketing workflows.

description.en: Create a subscriber import from a CSV string. The import starts in draft status — call start-subscriber-import to begin processing.
description.de: Einen Abonnenten-Import aus einem CSV-String erstellen. Der Import startet im Entwurfsstatus — starte den Import mit start-subscriber-import.

description.en: The UUID of the email list to import subscribers into.
CSV data with at minimum an email column. First row must be headers.
If true, previously unsubscribed subscribers will be re-subscribed.
If true, subscribers not in the CSV will be unsubscribed.
If true, existing tags will be replaced. If false, CSV tags are appended.

success.en: Subscriber import created with status '{{STATUS}}'. UUID: {{IMPORT_UUID}}
